name: sv.messaging.send
description: Send a message on a thread (the reply path for whoever started this turn, or a fresh message to any addressable participant). Delivery is one-way: returns a delivery acknowledgement, not the recipient's reply.

name: sv.messaging.multicast
description: Deliver the same message to an explicit address list or a resolved scope (unit-members, siblings). One delivery acknowledgement per recipient.

name: sv.directory.list
description: Enumerate members of a unit, the caller's siblings, or peers matching a role / expertise filter. Each entry carries the info needed to act on it (address, role, expertise, advisory live status).

name: sv.directory.lookup
description: Resolve a known address (e.g. the sender of the inbound message) to its display name, role, expertise, and advisory live status.

name: sv.progress.report
description: Publish a narrative progress beat (with optional 0..1 fraction) so a long-running turn is not silent until completion. Recorded as a RuntimeProgress activity.

name: sv.tools.list_categories
description: Enumerate the capability categories available to this runtime. Each entry is { name, description }; pass the name back into sv.tools.list.

name: sv.tools.list
description: Return the full tool definitions in a named category (name + description + input_schema) plus category-level usage guidance. After calling this you have everything needed to invoke the tools in that category — there is no separate describe step.
